strengths: Hands-on backend systems expertise at scale—Dunnhumby role built low-latency systems for millions of HTTP requests/second with async I/O and real-time data
Recent exposure to agentic-AI frameworks and MCP infrastructure through current re:cinq role
Proven track record shipping products with software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, top-10 app ranking at WatchUp)
concerns: No executive or management experience—resume is entirely individual-contributor focused with no evidence of team scaling, hiring, or P&L responsibility

Production agentic-AI systems experience is not substantiated—current role (4 months) contains only vague mentions of "AI-agent infrastructure"; no detail on production complexity, architectural decisions, or failure modes
Zero fintech or regulated-environment background—RIDE Capital mention is sparse and vague; no evidence of credit systems, trading, compliance, or high-stakes financial operations
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable engineer with solid backend systems experience and recent AI exposure, but fundamentally unqualified for a CTO role. His entire career is individual-contributor focused with zero evidence of executive leadership, team scaling (10-30+), or P&L ownership—critical for the role. His agentic-AI credentials rest entirely on a 4-month tenure at re:cinq with only vague mentions of "AI-agent infrastructure," providing no credible proof of production architectural depth, operational rigor, or sophisticated failure-mode handling required in fintech. He also lacks any meaningful fintech or regulated-environment background, which is essential for credit systems, compliance, and auditable decision-making. He is a strong individual engineer, not a CTO candidate.
